findings.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
findings.explanation: INV-1001 appears on more than one invoice.
findings.recommendedAction: Resolve duplicate document numbers before importing to Xero to avoid import conflicts.
findings.title: Duplicate invoice number

findings.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
findings.explanation: Acme Customer appears more than once.
findings.recommendedAction: Merge or rename duplicates before importing to Xero.
findings.title: Duplicate contact

findings.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
findings.explanation: invoice INV-1001 has a line without an account.
findings.recommendedAction: Assign an account to every transaction line before export.
findings.title: Missing account reference

findings.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
findings.explanation: Operating Expense is inactive but appears in migration data.
findings.recommendedAction: Reactivate, map, or exclude this record before import.
findings.title: Inactive account used

findings.businessImpact: Financial totals or allocations may be unreliable until this is resolved.
findings.explanation: INV-1001 total does not match line totals plus tax.
findings.recommendedAction: Review the invoice in QuickBooks before export.
findings.title: Invoice total mismatch

findings.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
findings.explanation: BILL-1001 does not reference an extracted supplier.
findings.recommendedAction: Repair the supplier reference before export.
findings.title: Missing supplier

findings.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
findings.explanation: Operating Expense has an unused duplicate that is excluded from migration. Operating Expense: closing balance 1500.00, period activity 500.00, dependencies 3.
findings.recommendedAction: Optionally archive or rename the unused duplicate in QuickBooks.
findings.title: Unused duplicate account

findings.businessImpact: Financial totals or allocations may be unreliable until this is resolved.
findings.explanation: JRN-1 has debits of 100 and credits of 80.
findings.recommendedAction: Correct or exclude unbalanced journal entries before migration.
findings.title: Unbalanced journal

nextSteps.description: Confirm that the assessment period and accounting basis match the migration scope.
nextSteps.title: Confirm reporting period and basis

nextSteps.description: Resolve failed controls and refresh any unavailable required reports.
nextSteps.title: Complete financial controls

nextSteps.description: Correct genuine accounting and source-record issues in QuickBooks.
nextSteps.title: Resolve source-data issues

nextSteps.description: Confirm account, tax, and tracking treatment for Xero.
nextSteps.title: Review mappings

nextSteps.description: Generate the reviewed Xero-ready files and Financial Assessment.
nextSteps.title: Generate the migration package

nextSteps.description: Test the reviewed migration files in a disposable Xero organisation.
nextSteps.title: Import into a Xero demo organisation

nextSteps.description: Reconcile trial balance, AR, AP, bank, retained earnings, and tax balances before go-live.
nextSteps.title: Verify destination balances

recommendations.action: Compare open bills with the QuickBooks AP aging report and correct the unmatched balance.
recommendations.businessImpact: Supplier balances may be misstated after migration if payables do not agree.
recommendations.reason: Open bills do not agree with the AP aging report.
recommendations.title: Resolve Accounts Payable difference

recommendations.action: Compare open invoices with the QuickBooks AR aging report and correct the unmatched balance.
recommendations.businessImpact: Customer balances may be misstated after migration if receivables do not agree.
recommendations.reason: Open invoices do not agree with the AR aging report.
recommendations.title: Resolve Accounts Receivable difference

recommendations.action: Reconcile QuickBooks bank balances to the ledger balance for the conversion date.
recommendations.businessImpact: Unreconciled bank balances reduce confidence in opening cash positions.
recommendations.reason: Bank account balances do not agree with the trial balance.
recommendations.title: Resolve Bank Reconciliation difference

recommendations.action: Compare account-level closing balances across the QuickBooks source reports.
recommendations.businessImpact: Closing-balance differences can create destination reconciliation breaks.
recommendations.reason: Comparable closing balances differ across source reports.
recommendations.title: Resolve Closing Balances difference

recommendations.action: Review conversion balances and correct the entries preventing them from netting to zero.
recommendations.businessImpact: Opening balances must balance before they can establish a reliable Xero starting position.
recommendations.reason: Conversion balances do not net to zero.
recommendations.title: Resolve Opening Balances difference

recommendations.action: Review retained earnings across the QuickBooks trial balance and balance sheet.
recommendations.businessImpact: A retained earnings difference can carry an incorrect equity position into Xero.
recommendations.reason: Retained earnings differs between source reports.
recommendations.title: Resolve Retained Earnings difference

recommendations.action: Review the trial balance difference in QuickBooks and correct the underlying entries before migration.
recommendations.businessImpact: An out-of-balance ledger cannot be reconciled reliably in Xero.
recommendations.reason: Total debits and credits do not agree.
recommendations.title: Resolve Trial Balance difference

recommendations.action: Resolve duplicate document numbers before importing to Xero to avoid import conflicts.
recommendations.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
recommendations.reason: INV-1001 appears on more than one invoice.
recommendations.title: Duplicate invoice number

recommendations.action: Merge or rename duplicates before importing to Xero.
recommendations.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
recommendations.reason: Acme Customer appears more than once.
recommendations.title: Duplicate contact

recommendations.action: Assign an account to every transaction line before export.
recommendations.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
recommendations.reason: invoice INV-1001 has a line without an account.
recommendations.title: Missing account reference

recommendations.action: Reactivate, map, or exclude this record before import.
recommendations.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
recommendations.reason: Operating Expense is inactive but appears in migration data.
recommendations.title: Inactive account used

recommendations.action: Review the invoice in QuickBooks before export.
recommendations.businessImpact: Financial totals or allocations may be unreliable until this is resolved.
recommendations.reason: INV-1001 total does not match line totals plus tax.
recommendations.title: Invoice total mismatch

recommendations.action: Repair the supplier reference before export.
recommendations.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
recommendations.reason: BILL-1001 does not reference an extracted supplier.
recommendations.title: Missing supplier

recommendations.action: Optionally archive or rename the unused duplicate in QuickBooks.
recommendations.businessImpact: Affected records may not migrate or reconcile cleanly.
recommendations.reason: Operating Expense has an unused duplicate that is excluded from migration. Operating Expense: closing balance 1500.00, period activity 500.00, dependencies 3.
recommendations.title: Unused duplicate account

recommendations.action: Correct or exclude unbalanced journal entries before migration.
recommendations.businessImpact: Financial totals or allocations may be unreliable until this is resolved.

recommendations.action: Review account, tax, and tracking suggestions before generating final Xero files.
recommendations.businessImpact: Confirmed mappings preserve the intended account, tax, and reporting treatment in Xero.
recommendations.reason: Mapping decisions are target-system choices, not accounting defects.
recommendations.title: Confirm migration decisions

dataQuality.explanation: Measures source-record completeness, references, duplicates, and transaction quality.
dataQuality.label: Data Quality

evidenceCoverage.explanation: Measures stable source lineage available for assessed records.
evidenceCoverage.label: Evidence Coverage

financialIntegrity.explanation: Measures deterministic agreement of core financial totals and controls.
financialIntegrity.label: Financial Integrity

migrationReadiness.explanation: Measures whether blocking issues and migration decisions have been resolved.
migrationReadiness.label: Migration Readiness

reconciliation.explanation: Measures agreement across trial balance, receivables, payables, banking, and retained earnings controls.
reconciliation.label: Reconciliation

summary.primaryRecommendation: Resolve failed financial controls before continuing.
